items.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant, a new default model for ChatGPT
items.description: The company said the model reduces hallucination in sensitive areas such as law, medicine, and finance, while maintaining the low latency of its predecessor.

items.title: PayPal says it’s ‘becoming a technology company again’ — that means AI
items.description: PayPal is pitching an AI-led turnaround, tying automation and restructuring to $1.5 billion in savings as it cuts jobs and works to modernize its tech stack.

items.description: The visual analysis system is now operating in select countries, but Meta says it's working toward a broader rollout.
